name: Layered Mexican Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash avocados with lemon juice to prevent darkening.
2. Layer refried beans on the bottom of a quich dish or other flat sided dish.
3. Layer the avocado slices.
4. Mix yogurt and sour cream with taco seasoning for the next layer.
5. Top with grated cheese.
6. Add chopped tomatoes as the final layer.
7. Serve with dipping chips.
